{{Quote|Mount up.|General Obi-Wan Kenobi|<ref name="Clone Wars Chapter 8">{{CW|8}}</ref>}}
The '''Lancer Battalions''' were units of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] made up of [[Clone lancer trooper|lancer troopers]]. These Lancer [[Battalion/Legends|Battalions]] were used occasionally against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist's]] [[IG lancer droid/Legends|IG lancer combat droids]] and unwieldy columns of battle droids. They were particularly remembered for their part in the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]], which took place four months into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Using [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] [[105-K lancer bike]]s, these specialized [[Landspeeder/Legends|speeder]]-mounted [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] engaged their enemy in physical combat, spearing the lancer droids with their [[Verpine power-lance]]s. The Lancer Battalions were usually deployed in order to distract the enemy from advancing [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries, which were used to batter down fortified targets. Presumably they were organized as standard battalions of 576 clone troopers and officers.
